SHAFT_Engine, 10.2.20260617

    Deprecated API

    Contents

    • Terminally Deprecated
    • Methods
    • Constructors
    • Terminally Deprecated Elements
      Element
      Description
      com.shaft.cli.TerminalActions(String, int, String, String, String, String, String)
      Docker-wrapped terminal execution is deprecated for removal; use remote or local TerminalActions.performTerminalCommand(String) without docker wrapping instead.
      com.shaft.cli.TerminalActions(String, String)
      Docker-wrapped terminal execution is deprecated for removal; use TerminalActions.performTerminalCommand(String) on the host or target environment directly.
      com.shaft.cli.TerminalActions.isDockerizedTerminal()
      Docker-wrapped terminal execution is deprecated for removal.
      com.shaft.properties.internal.Timeouts.dockerCommandTimeout()
      Docker-wrapped terminal execution is deprecated for removal.
      com.shaft.properties.internal.Timeouts.SetProperty.dockerCommandTimeout(int)
      Docker-wrapped terminal execution is deprecated for removal.
      com.shaft.tools.internal.FirestoreRestClient.createCounterDocument(String, String)
      Firestore counters are no longer used for telemetry; GA4 counts events natively.
      com.shaft.tools.internal.FirestoreRestClient.incrementCounter(String, String)
      Firestore counters are no longer used for telemetry; GA4 counts events natively.
      com.shaft.tools.internal.FirestoreRestClient.readCounter(String, String)
      Firestore counters are no longer used for telemetry; GA4 counts events natively.
